phase_name: Signal space, geometry land, line constraint, knife-edge

completed_tasks.name: Signal space probe: '15-dim' was truncation artifact. Margin converges. 73 near-zero eigenvalues converged.
Geometry land: Loewner inertia, CND, Bezoutian, interlacing -- all 4 killed.
Line constraint: dh/d(sigma)=0 at sigma=1/2 (functional equation). h_pair minimized. Curvatures isotropic (Laplace).
Critical tube: delta_crit~0.01. First zero carries 70% of curvature. Explicit formula constrains sum.
Dual test functions: Lorentzian=minimum, Gaussian/Power-s=2=maximum. Squeeze from both directions.
KNIFE-EDGE: Lorentzian property exists ONLY at exact Gamma diagonal (scale=1.00). -log(n) is unique critical rate.

remaining_tasks.name: Map the phase transition precisely: eigenvalue count vs diagonal scale, locate transition width, characterize the mechanism
Prove Step 3: -log(n) diagonal + Cauchy off-diagonal + prime sum => Lorentzian signature. The spectral phase transition.

next_action: MAP the knife-edge phase transition in fine detail (eigenvalue count vs scale, transition sharpness, mechanism), then PROVE that -log(n) is the critical exponent. This is a spectral theory question: the logarithmic diagonal decay from Gamma(s/2) is the unique rate producing exactly 1 positive eigenvalue in M = diag(C - log n) + Cauchy + prime_sum.
context_notes: Session 78 found the deepest structural insight in 78 sessions. The Lorentzian property (1 positive eigenvalue) is a CRITICAL PHENOMENON at the exact Gamma function diagonal value. The trivial zeros at s=-2,-4,-6,... produce wr_diag = C - log(n), which is the UNIQUE diagonal that creates Lorentzian signature. Scale by 5% either direction: breaks. Replace -log(n) with any -n^alpha: breaks. The proof chain is: (1) trivial zeros -> Gamma -> -log(n) diagonal [textbook], (2) -log(n) is critical exponent for Lorentzian [THIS IS THE GAP], (3) Lorentzian -> Q_W >= 0 -> RH [proved]. Proving step (2) transforms 'prove RH' into 'prove a spectral phase transition occurs at the logarithmic rate'. Key infrastructure: session78_line_constraint.py, session78b_critical_tube.py, session78c_tightness.py. Paper at v7: docs/lorentzian_weil_conjecture.tex (682 lines). 220 commits on main.
